news.title: US-Iran Two-Week Ceasefire Brokered by Pakistan; Strait of Hormuz to Reopen
news.summary: Iran agreed to reopen Hormuz under a tentative two-week ceasefire. Trump called it a 'double-sided ceasefire' with a workable 10-point peace plan.

news.title: Stocks Soar as Markets Rally on Ceasefire News; Dow Surges 1,325 Points
news.summary: All three major indexes surged over 2.5% after Trump suspended attacks on Iran, pausing the five-week conflict that disrupted global energy supplies.

news.title: Oil Prices Retreat from $110+ as Ceasefire Eases Strait of Hormuz Concerns
news.summary: Brent crude pulled back sharply after surging past $110/barrel. Traders pricing in potential normalization of shipping through Hormuz.

news.title: Vance to Lead US Negotiating Team at First Round of Iran Talks in Islamabad
news.summary: VP Vance heading to Pakistan Saturday to lead formal negotiations. Iran's Supreme National Security Council warned 'hands remain on the trigger.'

news.title: Pope Leo XIV Condemns Trump's Threat Against Iranian Civilian Infrastructure
news.summary: Pope called Trump's threat that 'a whole civilization will die tonight' if Iran doesn't deal 'truly unacceptable.'

news.title: Treasury Yields Ease to 4.31% as Geopolitical Tension Shifts
news.summary: 10-year yield pulled back from 4.38% intraday high as ceasefire news reduced safe-haven demand. Volatility persists.

news.title: Bitcoin Holds Above $71,900 Amid Market Uncertainty
news.summary: BTC trading at $71,906 as crypto markets react to geopolitical developments and shifting risk appetite.
